name: Sangria Serrano
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Apple juice or pineapple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the fruit and place it at the bottom of a large container with an attachable lid.
2. Pour in the Gallo Burgundy.
3. Add the Light Rum.
4. Pour in the Cointreau, vodka, and Grand Marnier.
5. Stir in the Seltzer, apple juice, pineapple juice, orange juice, and lime slices.
6. Add sugar to taste.
7. Refrigerate and cover until ready to serve.
8. Just before serving, add ice and pour in additional Seltzer if desired.
